headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large headers. Never use Inter for headers.

body.usage: Use for all UI text, translations, chat, and inputs.

surfaces.milled_crystal: Used for floating control bars and overlays. bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
surfaces.bento_cards: Used for side panels and lobby grids. bg-[#0E0E0E] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl

video_feeds.default: rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-black overflow-hidden relative

captions.style: Floating subtitles over video. bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-white/90 font-medium border border-white/10 shadow-lg text-lg text-center

grids.bento_lobby: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Camera preview col-span-8, Form/Settings col-span-4
grids.video_gallery: grid gap-4 w-full h-full p-4 (auto-fit or auto-fill based on participants)

layouts.meeting_room: h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden bg-void_black flex flex-col
layouts.side_panel: w-80 h-full bg-surface_1 border-l border-white/5 flex flex-col
layouts.control_bar: absolute bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-2xl milled_crystal z-50

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Use white text over dark backgrounds.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='mute-button')

media.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for a sophisticated, crisp look.
media.video_placeholders: Use object-cover for participant avatars when video is off.

landing_hero.description: Professional team video call on laptop

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the E1 anti-AI design patterns: Avoid purple gradients, standard inter headings, and flat uninspired cards.
Build a completely dark-themed UI. Ensure background is near void-black (#050505).
Implement Milled Crystal (glassmorphism) strictly as defined in visual_enhancers for the meeting control bar so it floats over the video.
Build the Pre-join lobby using a Bento grid layout (asymmetry is key here).
In the meeting room, build a dynamic CSS Grid for the video gallery that responds to the number of participants.
Integrate live translation subtitles overlaying the video feed elegantly using the captions style provided.
Make sure forms and inputs (Shadcn customized) use high-contrast borders and clear focus states.
Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (mute button, end call, send chat, join meeting, etc.).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this.
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients. Use solid dark colors with subtle borders and shadows.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy (e.g., control bar floats over video).
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur, high saturation) specifically for overlays.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g. `transition: all`). Apply it specifically to transform, opacity, colors.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in CSS.
Use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp buttons with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯) for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
